TYPES.FPCLINE: ebeln TYPE ebeln, " Purchasing Document Number
bsart TYPE esart, " Purchasing Document Type
lifnr TYPE elifn, " Vendor Account Number
zterm TYPE dzterm, " Terms of Payment Key
knumv TYPE knumv, " Number of the document condition
aedat TYPE erdat, " Date on Which Record Was Created
zbd1t TYPE dzbdet, " Cash (Prompt Payment) Discount Days
slfdt TYPE slfdt, " Statistics-Relevant Delivery Date
j_1iexrn TYPE j_1iexrn, " Excise Registration Number
j_1isern TYPE j_1isern, " TIN nO./Service Tax Registration Number
j_1icstno TYPE j_1icstno, " Central Sales Tax Number
j_1ilstno TYPE j_1ilstno, " Local Sales Tax Number
butxt TYPE butxt, " Name Of Company Code Or Company
mp_adrnr TYPE adrnr, " Main Plant Address_number
v_adrnr TYPE adrnr, " Vendor Address Number
banfn TYPE banfn, " Purchase Requisition Number
udate TYPE cddatum, " Creation date of the change document
ebelp TYPE ebelp, " Item Number of Purchasing Document
menge TYPE bstmg, " Purchase Order Quantity
meins TYPE bstme, " Purchase Order Unit of Measure
netpr TYPE bprei, " Net Price in Purchasing Document (in Document Currency)
netwr TYPE bwert, " Net Order Value in PO Currency
BRTWR TYPE bwert, " Gross Value in PO Currency
gewei TYPE egewe, " Unit of Weight
banfn TYPE banfn, " Purchase Requisition Number
eindt TYPE eindt, " Item Delivery Date
slfdt TYPE slfdt, " Statistics-Relevant Delivery Date
zeinr TYPE dzeinr, " Document number (without document management system)
vbeln TYPE vbeln, " Sales Order Number
vbelp TYPE vbelp, " Sales Order Item NUmber
inco2 TYPE ekko-inco2, " added by shreya
zeinr TYPE dzeinr, " Document number (without document management system)
gewei TYPE egewe, " Unit of Weight
kbetr TYPE string, "KBETR, " Rate (condition amount or percentage)
TYPES : tt_str type STANDARD TABLE OF ty_line,
TYPES : tt_eine TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_eine,
TYPES: ty_tab_items TYPE TABLE OF ty_item.
types: ty_tab_mara TYPE TABLE OF ty_mara.
types: ty_tab_konv TYPE TABLE OF ty_konv.
types: ty_tab_item_konv TYPE TABLE OF komv.
types: ty_text_lines1 TYPE TABLE OF tline.
TYPES : tt_text TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_text,
Types : tt_ekko1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_ekko1,

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: LOOP AT ekpo INTO wa_ekpo WHERE loekz NE 'L'.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM mara INTO gv_mara
READ TABLE it_eine INTO DATA(wa_eine) WITH KEY infnr = wa_item-infnr.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
DELETE it_lines WHERE tdline IS INITIAL .
SELECT SINGLE * FROM makt INTO wa_makt
SELECT SINGLE * FROM eket INTO wa_eket
* Begin of code to get memo
CONCATENATE wa_item-infnr wa_item-ekorg wa_item-esokz wa_ekpo-werks INTO lv_name1.
DELETE it_lines WHERE tdline IS INITIAL.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* End of code to get lv_memo
READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY knumv = wa_hdr-knumv kposn = wa_item-ebelp
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'HB01' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'R000' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZEXP' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
READ TABLE komv INTO ls_konv WITH KEY kschl = 'ZAFR' kposn = wa_item-ebelp.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM eskl INTO @DATA(wa_eskl) WHERE hpackno = @wa_item-packno.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM esll INTO @DATA(wa_esll) WHERE packno = @wa_item-packno.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM esll INTO @DATA(wa_serv) WHERE packno = @wa_esll-sub_packno.
READ TABLE eket INTO wa_eket INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM lfa1 INTO wa_lfa1
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005t INTO wa_t005t
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005u INTO wa_t005u
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t052u INTO wa_t052u
SELECT SINGLE * FROM tinct INTO wa_tinct
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lv_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 2.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 3.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 4.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 5.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 6.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t001w INTO wa_t001w
SELECT SINGLE * FROM t005t INTO wa_plant
SELECT SINGLE * FROM adrc INTO wa_adrc
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdhdr INTO gv_revcnt
READ TABLE it_cdhdr INTO wa_cdhdr INDEX 1.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to1 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to1 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to2 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to2 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to3 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to3 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to4 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to4 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN ship_to5 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN ship_to5 WITH space.
gv_total = gv_total + zch_amt + zch1_amt + gv_afr + gv_zexp.
CONCATENATE lv_dis gv_dis INTO lv_dis SEPARATED BY ' '.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 1.
READ TABLE lt_lines INTO ls_lines INDEX 2.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN cust1 WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN cust1 WITH space.
lv_str = 'Purchase Order General Terms and Conditions:- Please see attached.'.
lv_str = 'Purchase Order General Terms and Conditions:-'.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '&' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
READ TABLE it_lines INTO DATA(wa) INDEX lv_tabix.
READ TABLE lt_str ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>) WITH KEY row2 = lv_tabix.
CONCATENATE <fs>-line wa_line-tdline INTO <fs>-line SEPARATED BY space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '&' IN wa_line-tdline WITH space.
READ TABLE it_lines INTO DATA(wa1) INDEX lv_tabix1.
READ TABLE lt_str1 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH KEY row2 = lv_tabix1.
* CONCATENATE 'Rev:' ' ' lv_rec INTO lv_rev SEPARATED BY ' '.
CONCATENATE 'Date' gv_rev_dat INTO lv_varv3 SEPARATED BY ' '.
